UpdateInstanceSubnet.subnetId: Target subnet ID after the change
UpdateInstanceSubnet.internalIp: Specified private IP address; randomly assigned if not specified
UpdateInstanceSubnet.securityGroupIds: Update standard security groups; takes effect when changing subnet across VPCs; cannot be modified simultaneously with enterprise security groups
UpdateInstanceSubnet.enterpriseSecurityGroupIds: Update enterprise security groups; takes effect when changing subnet across VPCs; cannot be modified simultaneously with standard security groups
